text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Second Impression video game by STUDIO HARD TEAM4. It was published by Softbank Creative on 04 March 1997. https://www.amazon.co.jp/STUDIO-HARD-TEAM4/dp/4797302402/ 

Overview

This book contains screenshots and interviews by the autor of the game and its development.
